meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Aerospace Village  - Panel - Hackers and ISACs
meta.description: Across the aerospace sector, good faith research has a key role in highlighting both risks and vulnerabilities but it hasn’t always been welcomed with open arms. ISACs are often seen as a key point of contact for researchers and hackers doing this work but how best do we create relationships across hackers and ISACs to learn the lessons of the past and build the trust that we need?
